name: Laryn's Auction House
description:
This is a comfortable room that is crowded with people.  There are relaxing
benches laid around the room which people may rest on as they view the items up
for bid.  At the head of the room is a platform on which the auctioneer stands.
There is a large table on which the item up for bidding is placed upon, and a
lectern which the auctioneer stands behind.  Rules are posted on a huge sign
hanging on the wall.
